title: caleacte urticifolia
intro: Caleacte urticifolia, also known as California buttercup, is a flowering plant native to the western coast of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Caleacte urticifolia include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of Caleacte urticifolia are typically made by infusing the flowers or leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's roots and leaves in a tincture or salve.
